- **Analysis**:
- Cavernous sinus lies deep inside the skull base and contains several important structures like the internal carotid artery, oculomotor nerve (CN III), trochlear nerve (CN IV), abducens nerve (CN VI), and the ophthalmic branch of the trigeminal nerve (V1).
